decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to use cards like Generous Ent, Endurance, and Living End to manipulate the graveyard and bring back powerful creatures like Overlord of the Balemurk and Colossal Skyturtle. By controlling the board with cards like Subtlety and Force of Negation, the deck aims to set up a big combo turn where all the pieces come together to overwhelm the opponent and secure the win. Additionally, cards like Deceit and Formidable Speaker provide utility and flexibility to navigate various situations during the game.

This Temur Aggro deck focuses on fast-paced, aggressive gameplay and utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to quickly deal damage to the opponent. With efficient card draw and burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, along with creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Slickshot Show-Off, it aims to overwhelm the opponent and win the game before they have a chance to stabilize. The deck's mana base is carefully constructed to support this strategy, allowing for consistent access to the necessary colors of mana for its spells.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the Allosaurus Combo by using cards like Neoform and Eldritch Evolution to cheat out large creatures like Griselbrand and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. The key strategy is to use Allosaurus Rider's ability to splice Nourishing Shoal onto Summoner's Pact, gaining a large amount of life and allowing for a free cast of a huge creature. The deck also includes cards like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer to protect the combo and disrupt opponents, while also utilizing cards like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Generous Ent to generate additional value.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Allosaurus Rider and various green creatures to quickly ramp into powerful threats such as Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant and Xenagos, God of Revels. The deck utilizes cards like Eldritch Evolution and Neoform to tutor for key combo pieces, while also including disruption and protection in the form of Pact of Negation and Boseiju, Who Endures. The goal is to assemble a combo and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures, backed up by countermagic and other disruptive elements to protect the combo.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize fast, aggressive creatures like Guide of Souls, Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes support cards like Goblin Bombardment, Thraben Charm, and Ranger-Captain of Eos to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional support and buffs for the creatures, while cards like Blood Moon and Arena of Glory can further hinder the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to win quickly and decisively through aggressive plays and efficient removal.

The focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly bring out efficient threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury, while using cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge for removal and reach. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory for additional aggression and power. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of early aggression and powerful finishers, backed up by versatile removal options and card advantage engines like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Seasoned Pyromancer.

The main idea of this deck is to utilize a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful spells to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The deck focuses on quick creature plays such as Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, supported by cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge to deal damage and control the board. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker provide additional support and versatility to the deck. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy while maintaining control over the battlefield.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and disrupting opponents' game plans by taxing their resources. The deck utilizes powerful creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to pressure the opponent while using cards like Consign to Memory and Solitude to control the board and protect your own creatures. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's aggressive strategy and allow for consistent plays. Overall, the deck aims to quickly close out games by overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggression and disruption.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and tools to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By generating mana with Mox Opal and utilizing cards like Urza's Saga to create powerful artifacts, the deck can quickly build a threatening board presence. Cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke provide disruption and control elements, while Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager offer additional synergies and ways to leverage artifacts. Overall, the deck aims to use its affinity for artifacts to quickly outpace and defeat opponents in a fast-paced, aggressive fashion.

The deck focuses on creating a powerful combo involving Broodscale Bloodchief and other cards like Glaring Fleshraker, Kozilek's Command, and Malevolent Rumble. The goal is to control the board with Eldrazi creatures and disrupt the opponent's strategy while building up the power of Broodscale Bloodchief with Blade of the Bloodchief. Cards like Boseiju, Who Endures and Urza's Saga provide additional support and ramp. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures, removal spells, and powerful artifact synergies, ultimately leading to victory through a devastating combo.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on deploying efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to quickly overwhelm opponents. It also utilizes powerful spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to clear the path for its aggressive creatures. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls provides additional support and resilience to the deck. The deck also has some control elements with cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Thraben Charm to disrupt opponents' strategies. Overall, this deck aims to win the game through fast, relentless aggression.

This deck focuses on rapidly deploying artifacts and using them to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. The key strategy revolves around utilizing artifacts such as Mishra's Bauble and Engineered Explosives to generate advantage, while using creatures like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch to apply pressure and close out games quickly. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Pithing Needle and Metallic Rebuke to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining its own aggressive tempo. Additionally, the deck utilizes cards like Urza's Saga to continually generate threats and maintain board presence.

The deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with a strategy that disrupts the opponent's plans and forces them to play on the player's terms. It uses a combination of powerful creatures like Galvanic Discharge and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, alongside control elements like Solitude and Prismatic Ending to maintain board control. The deck also includes cards like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Casey Jones, Vigilante to further disrupt the opponent's strategies. With a mix of aggression and disruption, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly while limiting their options for counterplay.

The deck focuses on generating fast mana and card advantage to fuel a combo finish with cards like Pyretic Ritual, Desperate Ritual, and Ruby Medallion. Ral, Monsoon Mage and Glimpse the Impossible provide additional card draw and filtering, while Grapeshot serves as the primary win condition. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces while disrupting the opponent's game plan, ultimately leading to a explosive finish with a storm of spells. The inclusion of cards like Wish and Past in Flames provide additional flexibility and resilience to the deck's game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly apply pressure to the opponent with low-cost aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Cori-Steel Cutter, while disrupting their game plan with efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart. By utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration for card advantage, this deck aims to maintain a steady stream of threats while keeping the opponent on the back foot. The inclusion of cards like Violent Urge and Unholy Heat allows for additional reach and flexibility in dealing with various board states.

This deck employs a low-cost, fast-paced strategy that focuses on quickly getting artifacts onto the battlefield to overwhelm opponents with aggressive creatures and powerful artifacts. By utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble, Mox Opal, and Thoughtcast, the deck can quickly establish a strong board presence and maintain card advantage. The inclusion of cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt also allows for disruption of the opponent's game plan. Overall, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents through a combination of efficient card draw and powerful artifact synergies.
